techniques.name: Touch Interaction Behavior Authentication
techniques.description: Continuous authentication technique that utilizes touch interaction behavior, specifically analyzing features of swiping gestures to continuously authenticate users.
sources: @inproceedings{shenTouchinteractionBehaviorContinuous2015, title = {Touch-Interaction Behavior for Continuous User Authentication on Smartphones}, booktitle = {2015 {{International Conference}} on {{Biometrics}} ({{ICB}})}, author = {Shen, Chao and Zhang, Yong and Cai, Zhongmin and Yu, Tianwen and Guan, Xiaohong}, year = {2015}, month = may, pages = {157--162}, issn = {2376-4201}, doi = {10.1109/ICB.2015.7139046}}
